title: polyalthia wrayi
intro: Polyalthia wrayi, also known as the Kassod tree, is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae, native to Malaysia. The bark, leaves, and roots of the Polyalthia wrayi plant have been traditionally used in medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Polyalthia wrayi include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection and promote wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in traditional medicine to make decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
